name: Indeed
description: Largest job board by traffic volume with 350M+ monthly visitors globally. Strong organic SEO, pay-per-click and sponsored job models, ATS integration via Indeed Hiring Platform. Best for high-volume, hourly, and entry-level hiring.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $0.55, average CPA $28.00. Sponsored jobs and premium listings available.

name: LinkedIn
description: Highest quality professional candidate pool with 1B+ members and 65M decision makers. InMail for direct sourcing, detailed professional targeting, strong employer branding tools. Best for professional, passive candidate, and executive search.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $5.26 (range $1.50-$8.00). Sponsored Jobs CPA $30-$90 (US avg ~$45). InMail CPA $1-$8 per InMail credit. Recruiter seat licenses, LinkedIn Jobs, and Talent Solutions. [Updated 2026-04-07, source: Postiv.ai, SpeedWork Social, Recruitics 2025-2026]

name: ZipRecruiter
description: AI matching technology (Phil) for candidate-job fit with 25M+ monthly visitors. One-click apply increases application volume. Distributes to 100+ partner boards. Strong SMB market penetration.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $0.70, average CPA $32.00. Subscription plans for SMB.

name: Glassdoor
description: Combined job search and employer reviews platform with 55M+ monthly visitors. Salary transparency builds candidate trust. Integrates with Indeed (same parent: Recruit Holdings). Candidates are more informed and qualified.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $0.90, average CPA $42.00. Enhanced employer profiles available.

name: Monster
description: Legacy job board with 30M+ monthly visitors. Lower CPC than Indeed/LinkedIn. Strong in healthcare and government sectors. Resume database and Power Resume Search for targeted sourcing. Good EMEA presence.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $0.45, average CPA $35.00. Volume discounts available.

name: CareerBuilder
description: Enterprise-focused job board with 20M+ monthly visitors. Supply-side intelligence and labor market analytics. Broad industry coverage with compliance and background check integrations. Competitive pricing for volume buyers.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $0.50, average CPA $38.00. Enterprise packages available.

name: Dice
description: Highly targeted tech talent pool with 6M+ monthly visitors. Detailed skills-based matching. Strong for contract/freelance tech roles. IntelliSearch for proactive sourcing. Tech salary and career tools build engagement.
pricing_info: Pay-per-click model. Average CPC $1.20, average CPA $48.00. Tech-specific packages.

name: Google for Jobs
description: Free organic distribution via structured data markup with billions of Google searches monthly. Aggregates from multiple job boards automatically. Location-based job matching. Mobile-optimized experience. No direct posting -- requires structured data on your site or board.
pricing_info: Free. No CPC or CPA. Requires structured data markup (schema.org/JobPosting) on your career site.
